info.title: dwizzyBRAIN API
info.description: Standardized read API for market snapshots, OHLCV candles, aggregated tickers, arbitrage signals, quant pattern search, DeFi registry reads, news feeds, and auth/session endpoints.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Discord OAuth2 login, sessions, and token refresh

tags.name: DeFi
tags.description: Public DeFi registry and snapshot endpoints

tags.name: News
tags.description: Public news feeds, trends, and article reads

tags.name: Quant
tags.description: Quant pattern search and similarity analytics

200.description: Discord authorization URL and state payload
Rotated access and refresh token response

get.summary: Get a news article or category feed

200.description: News article detail or category feed

get.summary: Get news articles for a coin

200.description: News articles associated with a coin

get.summary: Search similar historical candles by fingerprint

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of pattern matches to return.

parameters.name: min_matches
parameters.description: Confidence gate threshold for the similarity sample size.

get.summary: Get the latest quant signal for a market

parameters.name: exchange
parameters.description: Optional exchange filter such as binance.

get.summary: List recent quant signals for a market

parameters.name: exchange
parameters.description: Optional exchange filter such as binance.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of signals to return.

get.summary: Summarize recent quant signals for a market

parameters.name: exchange
parameters.description: Optional exchange filter such as binance.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Sample size used for the summary.

CoinID.name: id
CoinID.description: Canonical coin identifier such as bitcoin or ethereum.

Limit.name: limit
Limit.description: Maximum number of items to return.

Exchange.name: exchange
Exchange.description: Exchange identifier such as binance, bybit, kraken, okx, kucoin, gateio, mexc, or htx.

OHLCVLimit.name: limit
OHLCVLimit.description: Maximum number of candles to return.

OverviewLimit.name: limit
OverviewLimit.description: Maximum number of items to show in each overview section.

ArbitrageLimit.name: limit
ArbitrageLimit.description: Maximum number of arbitrage signals to return.

NewsLimit.name: limit
NewsLimit.description: Maximum number of news articles to return.

NewsCategory.name: category
NewsCategory.description: Optional article category filter such as defi, regulation, or macro.

NewsValue.name: value
NewsValue.description: Either a numeric article id or a category slug.

TrendingLimit.name: limit
TrendingLimit.description: Maximum number of trending items to return per section.
